info.title: Checkmate API
info.description: Checkmate is an open source monitoring tool used to track the operational status and performance of servers and websites. It regularly checks whether a server/website is accessible and performs optimally, providing real-time alerts and reports on the monitored services' availability, downtime, and response time.

comment.example: Issue resolved by restarting the service

notifications.description: Array of notification IDs to associate with this monitor

endTime.description: When the incident was resolved (null if ongoing)

resolvedBy.description: User ID who resolved the incident (for manual resolution)

checks.description: Array of check IDs associated with this incident

averageResolutionTime.description: Average time to resolve incidents in milliseconds

ack.description: Whether the check has been acknowledged

CheckTimings.description: Detailed timing information for HTTP checks
